title: Allocation Formulas, Overflow, and Capacity Proofs · Failure Case: Multiply Before Allocation
summary: A scientific grid grows from untrusted dimensions and allocates too little after an apparently reasonable multiplication wraps. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem multiply before allocation increment in overflow-safe grid allocator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prove count times element-size representability before calling allocation functions.
Adopt C23 free_sized and free_aligned_sized only behind exact size, alignment, availability, and fallback contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
